plan.reason: A pop-up titled '保存网页地址' (Save webpage address) is appearing on top of the main game interface. I need to close this pop-up to proceed and click the '进入游戏' button. The 'X' button to close the pop-up is at the top right corner of the box.
A pop-up window is guiding the user to save the webpage address. I need to close this pop-up to proceed with launching the game. I will click the close button in the top-right corner of the pop-up.

A pop-up titled '保存网页地址' (Save Webpage Address) is covering the main content and blocking progress. It appears to be an instructional guide rather than a critical system message. I need to close it by clicking the 'X' button in the top-right corner to continue with the game startup process.
页面正中出现了一个引导性质的弹窗（收藏网页地址引导），它遮挡了主界面。需要点击弹窗右上角的关闭按钮将其关闭，以便继续进行后续的启动游戏和领取奖励操作。
